title: If ______ was directing Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: If ______ was directing Evangelion             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jun 12, 2015 12:52 pm Simply put, name a famous filmmaker, and the replies will describe what the result would be if s/he was directing an EVA series/movie

[]:             Quote Post by TheAdmiral » Fri Jun 12, 2015 1:26 pm Michael Bay https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FckkZihQUaU

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Fri Jun 12, 2015 5:25 pm Lars von Trier

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jun 12, 2015 6:33 pm Stanley Kubrick: -Many more symmetrical shot compositions. -Much more use of wide angle shots. -Much more Kubrick Stare shots of the pilots. -even more sexual imagery.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jun 12, 2015 7:13 pm Chuck Jones: -Facial expressions that'll express the inner emotions in 10 seconds -Witty one-liners that'll expose how self-delusional the characters really are -Waiting for it to be funny Ikuhara: -Explore the sexuality of everyone -Make you laugh for no reason -Have battles take place over rock songs that no otaku knows about or songs that doesn't make sense at first viewing Charlie Chaplin: -Explore Shinji/Rei and/or Shinji/Asuka -Put in drama in an overly comedic experience -Have set pieces that'll inspire comedians decades from now

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 12, 2015 7:41 pm I'd really like to see Ikuhara direct something Eva related.

[]:             Quote Post by The Cruel » Fri Jun 12, 2015 8:47 pm My candidates for directing Evangelion: David Lynch Darren Aronofsky Oliver Stone Francis Ford Coppola Ridley Scott Stanley Kubrick Christopher Nolan Zack Snyder James Cameron Their films have a lot in common with Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Fri Jun 12, 2015 8:53 pm I was actually about to say Lynch too, that would be a fucking trip.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Fri Jun 12, 2015 9:00 pm LYNCH WOULD BE THE BEST EVER. Also.... Cronenberg. Can you imagine that? The tight character studies, combined with questions of humanity mingled into gripping and skincrawling body horror?

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jun 12, 2015 9:03 pm I wish someone would make a Tex Avery version of Evangelion. Just so I can see Kaworu pull up a "Silly, isn't it" sign.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri Jun 12, 2015 9:24 pm Cary Fukunaga - Long panning shots of Tokyo 3 infrastructure - Wide shots of the characters conversing in front of decrepit post-Impact landscapes - Time is a flat circle

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jun 12, 2015 9:28 pm Jim Henson -Spiritual music -The universe will be the selling point -Be a cult hit decades from now

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Fri Jun 12, 2015 10:50 pm It's not easy...being me.... Having to save the world at only...fourteen.... When I think it would be nicer to be boring, and bland, or unknown... Or something much more normal like that.... It's not easy...being me.... It seems you're so small compared to other things And people only want you when you can do things like fight off Angels As they fall from the sky.... But being me is all I can be And I can be kind and sweet and gentle and free When I cook a meal or play a song or just listen to someone who really needs an ear Or kind sympathy When me is all there is to be It could make you wonder why, but why wonder? Why Wonder, I'm me...and it'll do fine. It's beautiful! And I think it's who I want to be....

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jun 12, 2015 11:20 pm ^ Close the thread everyone, we have the best post here. Mamoru Oshii -Talk philosophy -Let the audience soak in the moody atmosphere of Tokyo-3 -Music by Kenji Kawai

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Fri Jun 12, 2015 11:30 pm Beautiful........Hits right in the feels.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Fri Jun 12, 2015 11:44 pm Thanks. I must to bed now. G'night.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 13, 2015 2:01 am C.A.P. wrote: Mamoru Oshii

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jun 13, 2015 2:04 am Fuyutsuki is the basset hound.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sat Jun 13, 2015 4:32 am What about Leiji Matsumoto?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Jun 13, 2015 4:59 am Tim Burton. -Lots of skulls and black everywhere, especially on the Evas -People being paler than Rei -Johnny Depp is a quirky Ritsuko -Helena Bonham Carter as either Rei or Asuka
summary:
[]: If ______ was directing Evangelion             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jun 12, 2015 12:52 pm Simply put, name a famous filmmaker, and the replies will describe what the result would be if s/he was directing an EVA series/movie

[]:             Quote Post by TheAdmiral » Fri Jun 12, 2015 1:26 pm Michael Bay https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FckkZihQUaU
